# Workflow Cannon Copilot Instructions

Use the repository root `AGENTS.md` as the entrypoint for agent guidance. It routes agents to `.ai/AGENTS.md`, `.ai/agent-source-of-truth-order.md`, `.ai/machine-cli-policy.md`, `.ai/WORKSPACE-KIT-SESSION.md`, `.ai/MACHINE-PLAYBOOKS.md`, and module instruction files.

This file exists so VS Code and Copilot workspace-instruction discovery has an intentional project-level surface. Do not duplicate the canonical Workflow Cannon rules here; update the `.ai/` sources or module instructions instead.
